PreToolUse.description: Secret scanner — blocks commits containing API keys or credentials
Dangerous command blocker — prevents rm -rf, force push to main, etc.

PostToolUse.description: Post-write linter — runs ESLint, gofmt, or rustfmt based on file type
Post-write type checker — runs tsc or go build for changed package
Post-write test runner — runs tests related to the changed file
Hex colour guard — blocks hex colours in component files outside tokens.ts
OpenAPI drift guard — warns when TypeScript API client is stale

UserPromptSubmit.description: Context loader — injects current phase from docs/progress.md
